alerts.title: Seasonal road closures
alerts.description: Heintooga Ridge Road is closed for the season

alerts.title: Temporary Road Closures
alerts.description: Hyatt Lane in Cades Cove is closed due to bear activity.

alerts.title: Park Headquarters Road closed
alerts.description: Park Headquarters Road is closed due to rehabilitation work on the Sugarlands water and wastewater systems.

alerts.title: Straight Fork and the one-way section of Balsam Mountain Road closed.
alerts.description: Straight Fork and the one-way section of Balsam Mountain Road (Heintooga Round-Bottom Road) are closed.

alerts.title: Most visitors need a parking tag
alerts.description: All vehicles parking for longer than 15 minutes require a parking tag. Three tag durations are available for purchase for all vehicle sizes and types: Daily ($5), Weekly ($15), or Annual ($40).
